title: Question: Some SV features seem to be unsupported
body:
---


Author Name: **Bob Newgard**
Original Redmine Message: 1366 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I am trying to use SV struct and interface features but have recieved errors from verilator. While I can work around these for my current project, I thought I should report them, and learn if I am using Verilator correctly.  I've attached example SV files and describe each one below.

Regards,

Bob

--


Example 1: the attached file sequential_anon_struct.v codes a few anonymous (not typedef-ed) structures.  Verilator seems to fail when two anonymous structs are coded in sequence.  If the commented code between the two structs is uncommented, verilator succeeds.

```
% verilator -Wall --cc sequential_anon_struct.v
%Error: sequential_anon_struct.v:11: Duplicate declaration of TYPEDEF '__typeimpsu0': __typeimpsu0
%Error: sequential_anon_struct.v:1: ... Location of original declaration
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall --cc sequential_anon_struct.v

``` 

Example 2: the attached file interface_only.v codes a simple interface definition. Verilator fails, requesting a module to process.

```
% verilator -Wall -Wno-DECLFILENAME --cc interface_only.v
%Error: Internal Error: ../V3LinkLevel.cpp:92: No module found to process
%Error: Internal Error: See the manual and http://www.veripool.org/verilator for more assistance.
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall -Wno-DECLFILENAME --cc interface_only.v

```

Example 3: the attached file interface_gen.v codes a generate statement within an interface.  Verilator seems to not support this.

```
% verilator -Wall --cc interface_gen.v
%Error: interface_gen.v:4: syntax error, unexpected generate
%Error: Cannot continue
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall --cc interface_gen.v

```

Example 4: the attached file interface_pkg.v codes an interface within a package.  Verilator seems to not support this.

```
% verilator -Wall --cc interface_pkg.v
%Error: interface_pkg.v:2: syntax error, unexpected interface
%Error: interface_pkg.v:5: syntax error, unexpected endpackage
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall --cc interface_pkg.v

```
code_blocks:
% verilator -Wall --cc sequential_anon_struct.v
%Error: sequential_anon_struct.v:11: Duplicate declaration of TYPEDEF '__typeimpsu0': __typeimpsu0
%Error: sequential_anon_struct.v:1: ... Location of original declaration
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall --cc sequential_anon_struct.v

% verilator -Wall -Wno-DECLFILENAME --cc interface_only.v
%Error: Internal Error: ../V3LinkLevel.cpp:92: No module found to process
%Error: Internal Error: See the manual and http://www.veripool.org/verilator for more assistance.
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall -Wno-DECLFILENAME --cc interface_only.v

% verilator -Wall --cc interface_gen.v

%Error: interface_pkg.v:5: syntax error, unexpected endpackage
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall --cc interface_pkg.v
